sections.title: U.S. Individual Income Tax Return
sections.content:
OMB No. 1545-0074

IRS Use Only-Do not write or staple in this space.

For the year Jan. 1-Dec. 31, 2025, or other tax year beginning

, 2025, ending

, 20

See separate instructions.

- [ ] Filed pursuant to section 301.9100-2 /Off

- [ ] Combat zone /Off

- [ ] Deceased MM      DD      YYYY / / /Off

Spouse MM      DD      YYYY / /

- [ ] Other /Off

Your first name and middle initial

If joint return, spouse's first name and middle initial

Last name

Foreign province/state/county                                        Foreign postal code

Check here if your main home, and your spouse's if filing a joint return, was in the U.S. for more than half of 2025. /Off

Presidential Election Campaign Check here if you, or your spouse if filing jointly, want $3 to go to this fund. Checking a box below will not change your tax or refund.

- [ ] You /Off

- [ ] Spouse /Off

sections.title: Filing Status
sections.content:
Check only one box.

- [ ] Single /Off

- [ ] Married filing jointly (even if only one had income) /Off

- [ ] Married filing separately (MFS). Enter spouse's SSN above and full name here: /Off

- [ ] Head of household (HOH) /Off

- [ ] Qualifying surviving spouse (QSS) /Off

If you checked the HOH or QSS box, enter the child's name if the qualifying person is a child but not your dependent:

- [ ] If treating a nonresident alien or dual-status alien spouse as a U.S. resident for the entire tax year, check the box and enter their name (see instructions and attach statement if required): /Off

Digital Assets At any time during 2025, did you: (a) receive (as a reward, award, or payment for property or services); or (b) sell, exchange, or otherwise dispose of a digital asset (or a financial interest in a digital asset)? (See instructions.) . .

- [ ] Yes /Off

- [ ] No /Off

Form

1040

<!-- image -->

Department of the Treasury-Internal Revenue Service

## U.S. Individual Income Tax Return

OMB No. 1545-0074

IRS Use Only-Do not write or staple in this space.

For the year Jan. 1-Dec. 31, 2025, or other tax year beginning

, 2025, ending

, 20

See separate instructions.

- [ ] Filed pursuant to section 301.9100-2 /Off

- [ ] Combat zone /Off

- [ ] Deceased MM      DD      YYYY / / /Off

Spouse MM      DD      YYYY / /

- [ ] Other /Off

Your first name and middle initial

Last name

Your social security number

If joint return, spouse's first name and middle initial

Last name

Spouse's social security number

Home address (number and street). If you have a P.O. box, see instructions.

Apt. no.

City, town, or post office. If you have a foreign address, also complete spaces below.

State

ZIP code

Foreign country name

Foreign province/state/county                                        Foreign postal code

Check here if your main home, and your spouse's if filing a joint return, was in the U.S. for more than half of 2025. /Off

Presidential Election Campaign Check here if you, or your spouse if filing jointly, want $3 to go to this fund. Checking a box below will not change your tax or refund.

- [ ] You /Off

- [ ] Spouse /Off

## Filing Status

Check only one box.

- [ ] Single /Off

- [ ] Married filing jointly (even if only one had income) /Off

- [ ] Married filing separately (MFS). Enter spouse's SSN above and full name here: /Off

- [ ] Head of household (HOH) /Off

- [ ] Qualifying surviving spouse (QSS) /Off

If you checked the HOH or QSS box, enter the child's name if the qualifying person is a child but not your dependent:

- [ ] If treating a nonresident alien or dual-status alien spouse as a U.S. resident for the entire tax year, check the box and enter their name (see instructions and attach statement if required): /Off

Digital Assets At any time during 2025, did you: (a) receive (as a reward, award, or payment for property or services); or (b) sell, exchange, or otherwise dispose of a digital asset (or a financial interest in a digital asset)? (See instructions.) . .

- [ ] Yes /Off

- [ ] No /Off

## Dependents

(see instructions)

If more than four dependents, see instructions and check here . . /Off

Dependent 2

Dependent 3

Dependent 4
